Class RowsAndColumnsRule

java.lang.Object
sudokusolver.sudoku.SudokuRule
sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
public class RowsAndColumnsRule extends SudokuRule
Enforces that the values in each row and column of a specified rectangle must be distinct.

  • Field Summary

    Field
    Description
    int
    height
    The height of the rectangle.

    The top-left cell of the rectangle.

    apply(Sudoku sudoku)

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public Set<Constraint> apply(Sudoku sudoku)
      Description copied from class: SudokuRule
      Translates this high-level Sudoku rule into a set of lower-level CSP constraints bound to the current game configuration.

      Variable Naming Contract: When implementing this method, the text identifiers (variable names) passed into the Constraint constructors MUST strictly correspond to the string representation of the target cells (like returned by Cell.toString()).

      Specified by:
      apply in class SudokuRule
      Parameters:
      sudoku - the context and configuration of the active Sudoku board
      Returns:
      a set of Constraint objects that enforce this rule within the CSP model of the Sudoku puzzle
